Rollercoaster Phase (What Happens): Slow Climb (Q4 2025: Mild Dip Starts, Weak Hands Shake Out)
Watch These 3 Signals (Easy Checks + Why: 1. Fear Gauge (VIX: Measures stock panic like a heartbeat—rising means nerves); 2. Job Worry (Unemployment Rate: Tracks layoffs; uptick signals slowdown); 3. Shopper Mood (Consumer Confidence: Surveys spending plans; drop means hesitation).
Crowd Moves (Retail/Mom-Pops: What They: Buy the "deal" early (10–15% inflows to stocks at -5–10% dip); Watch: App trades spike (Robinhood volume +20%), but sell if mood <65 (FOMO trap).
Pro Moves (Elites/Buffett: What They Do: Hold cash ($334B Berkshire pile grows); Watch: No big sells yet (equity outflows < $50B/wk), prepping for deeper drop.
Red Flag (Warning: Sell or Hold Cash): VIX over 20; Jobs up 0.3% (to 4.6%); Mood below 65.
Green Light (Opportunity: Buy In): VIX under 15; Jobs steady; Mood over 70.
When to Expect It: Oct–Dec 2025: Shutdown + holidays cause 5–10% drop; crowd jumps in, pros sit tight.

Rollercoaster Phase (What Happens): First Drop (Dec 2025–Jan 2026: Dip Speeds Up, Crowd Panics)
Watch These 3 Signals (Easy Checks + Why: 1. Factory Speed (ISM PMI: Gauges business orders; below 50 = contraction); 2. Bond Curve (Yield Spread: Compares short/long rates; inversion flags recession); 3. Tariff Heat (Trade Tax Rate: Higher taxes hike prices, slow growth).
Crowd Moves (Retail/Mom-Pops: What They: Absorb more (dip-buy blue-chips like Tesla at -15%); Watch: Inflows +$100–200B but outflows if PMI<46 (early regret).
Pro Moves (Elites/Buffett: What They Do: Trim holdings quietly (sell overvalued like Apple); Watch: Cash hoard hits $350B, shorts rise <5% (positioning for low).
Red Flag (Warning: Sell or Hold Cash): Factories <46; Curve inverts deeper (-0.2%); Tariffs over 20%.
When to Expect It: Dec 2025–Jan: Fed cuts + debt talks; 12–20% total drop; retail sells half, elites eye the plunge.

Rollercoaster Phase (What Happens): Big Plunge (Q1 2026: Full Crash, Elite Buy Time)
Watch These 3 Signals (Easy Checks + Why: 1. Job Alarm (Sahm Rule: +0.5% job rise over year = recession auto-alert); 2. Price Tag (S&P P/E: Stock "sale price"; low = bargain); 3. Options Fear (Put/Call Ratio: Bets on fall vs rise; high = mass fear).
Crowd Moves (Retail/Mom-Pops: What They: Capitulate & flee (15–25% outflows to cash); Watch: Volume surges but AAII bulls <20% (herd stampede—missed wave two).
Pro Moves (Elites/Buffett: What They Do: Load up big (deploy 50–70% at -25–35%, e.g., Buffett's Goldman-style bets); Watch: VIX>40 + P/E<15x (1.5x outperformance signal).
Red Flag (Warning: Sell or Hold Cash): Jobs up 0.5%; P/E under 18; Ratio over 1.
Green Light (Opportunity: Buy In): Jobs stable; P/E over 20; Ratio under 0.8.
When to Expect It: Jan–Mar 2026: Tariffs + layoffs; 25–35% drop; crowd out, pros in—don't chase, wait here.

Rollercoaster Phase (What Happens): Bottom Loop (Mid-2026: Ride Levels Out, Fed Saves It)
Watch These 3 Signals (Easy Checks + Why: 1. Fed Rate (Interest Cut Depth: Lower rates = cheap money boost); 2. Earnings Surprise (Company Profits: % beating forecasts = health check); 3. Global Trade (Baltic Dry Index: Shipping costs; low = world slowdown).
Crowd Moves (Retail/Mom-Pops: What They: Re-enter timidly (+$300B rebound buys); Watch: Earnings >60% beats but bail if trade < -15% (false recovery).
Pro Moves (Elites/Buffett: What They Do: Scale in fully (front-run rebound, e.g., +40–60% on wave two entry); Watch: Fed<3.5% + PMI>48 (lock gains, trim at +30%).
Red Flag (Warning: Sell or Hold Cash): Rates below 3.5%; Profits beat 60%; Shipping up 5%.
Green Light (Opportunity: Buy In): Rates steady >4%; Profits miss >40%; Shipping down 15%.
When to Expect It: Apr–Jun 2026: Emergency cuts; bottom holds at -25–35%; recovery kicks—elites compound.

Rollercoaster Phase (What Happens): Upward Climb (Q4 2026: Fast Rebound, New Highs)
Watch These 3 Signals (Easy Checks + Why: 1. Growth Speed (GDP: Economy's speedometer; higher = acceleration); 2. Job Peak (Unemployment Fall: From high to hiring mode); 3. Factory Boom (ISM PMI Recovery: Orders rebounding).
Crowd Moves (Retail/Mom-Pops: What They: Chase the rally (full absorption, +$500B inflows); Watch: GDP>1.5% but sell 20% at +40% (lock profits).
Pro Moves (Elites/Buffett: What They Do: Hold & harvest (dividends + trim 25–30% at peaks); Watch: Unemp<4.5% + PMI>50 (exit for next cycle, 85% <2y full win).
Red Flag (Warning: Sell or Hold Cash): GDP over 1.5%; Jobs down to 4.5%; Factories >50.
When to Expect It: Jul–Dec 2026: Stimulus + elections; +40–55% gain from lows; crowd celebrates, pros plan ahead.
